derive.title: Cartridge bay
derive.detail: Select a repo cartridge to hand off into the manifest-backed Collections resolve flow.

derive.title: Cartridge bay
derive.detail: Selection has been handed to the existing Collections resolve surface. Mount remains explicit there.

guardrails: Cartridge Bay does not bypass manifest validation.
Cartridge Bay does not mount directly.
Cartridge Bay selection hands off into the existing Collections resolve-then-mount flow.
Cartridge Bay does not change save or export boundaries.
